text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with<n>T.M. Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho! It appears the rather intense<n>gaze I was
feeling belongs to that<n>cute little audience!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She points toward a claw machine<n>filled with
Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Forever trapped within a glass cage,<n>they can
never bask in the sun that is<n>my presence!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And I, who brings light to this world,<n>shall provide
you support with an<n>inspiring opera!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
May your rescue scene be a<n>success, so as not
to crush the hopes<n>and dreams of those children!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
